summary: Evolution PRO OS - Light Theme & Course Builder AI Testing. Fixed dark theme CSS issue in App.css. Course Builder AI now generates real courses via Claude API (no mock fallback).
passed_tests: Admin Dashboard - light theme applied (body: rgb(250,250,247), sidebar: rgb(255,255,255)) ✅
Course Builder /api/stefania/course-builder/generate - returns REAL AI-generated course structure (not mock) ✅
Course Builder /api/stefania/course-builder/chat - returns REAL AI responses (not mock) ✅
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light theme is now fully applied across the app. CSS variables in App.css were updated from dark (#0B0E14) to light (#FAFAF7) theme. Course Builder AI is working with real Claude API responses.

fixes_applied.App.css: Changed --evo-bg from #0B0E14 (dark) to #FAFAF7 (light), --evo-surface from #1a2332 to #FFFFFF, --evo-text from #F8FAFC to #1E2128, --evo-text-muted from #94A3B8 to #9CA3AF, --evo-border from rgba(255,255,255,0.1) to #ECEDEF. Also updated scrollbar and glass effect colors.

verified_features.light_theme_admin_dashboard: WORKING - light cream background, white sidebar
verified_features.course_builder_ai_generate: WORKING - Real AI responses from Claude, generates detailed course structures in Italian
verified_features.course_builder_ai_chat: WORKING - Real AI responses from Claude, provides instructional design advice
